No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education and professional competence in technology law and policy (Targets 4.3, 4.4). It equips students with critical analysis skills for global issues, contributing to relevant knowledge.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly addresses how technical innovation and technology policy impact the global economy and supply chains, aligning with Target 8.2 on economic productivity and technological upgrading.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core focus on technical innovation, technology law and policy, technology transfer, and government-funded research directly aligns with enhancing scientific research, technological capabilities, and innovation (Targets 9.5, 9.b).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course examines the 'changing global order' and 'US-China technology competition,' which implicitly involves discussions on international economic power dynamics and potential inequalities in technology access and governance (Target 10.6).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate change or climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine life or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's central theme is 'Law and Policy on Technology, Diplomacy, and National Security,' directly addressing national-level regulations, export controls, and policy formulation, which are fundamental to promoting the rule of law and effective institutions (Targets 16.3, 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly covers 'Diplomacy,' 'techno-geopolitical tensions,' and 'cooperation between the EU and Asia,' directly addressing international cooperation, policy coherence, and global partnerships in technology and national security (Targets 17.6, 17.13, 17.16).
